channel.title: Every thing is duplicated in source when adding custom post types
channel.description:
Hello again my rescuers :smiley:
I noticed that everything in `state.source.postTypes` and `libraries.source.handlers` is duplicated for the added CPT ![image|587x500](upload://uxF2dMmKUAloPIxt9U1PvMuGSZ2.png)
![image|532x292](upload://nkvQ54n9kgWgSLrxawzX4HksM4y.png)
![image|526x500](upload://6lcKjmTaDeet0i8FKUJ8atg3S5e.png)
I don't know if this is the intended behavior or am I making anything wrong??
By the way I'm about to release this site soon and I'm very excited to share it with you so I can get your helpful feedback :slight_smile:
Thanks guys.

item.title: Every thing is duplicated in source when adding custom post types
item.dc:creator: SantosGuillamot
item.description:
Hi @modyydom! Could you please try updating now? We’ve just released the new version where this bug is solved (You can check the full announcement at this topic).

Read full topic
item.source: Every thing is duplicated in source when adding custom post types

item.title: Every thing is duplicated in source when adding custom post types
item.dc:creator: SantosGuillamot
item.description:
Hello

It seems the same bug as this one. We were working on that and found a solution and it was merged yesterday. Once we release a new version, you should update your Frontity site and this problem should be solved. We’ll let you know once this is ready.

modyydom:

I’m about to release this site soon and I’m very excited to share it with you so I can get your helpful feedback

We’re pretty excited about this too We really want to see what you’ve been building these last weeks. keep us posted!

Read full topic
item.source: Every thing is duplicated in source when adding custom post types

item.title: Every thing is duplicated in source when adding custom post types
item.dc:creator: modyydom
item.description:
Hello again my rescuers

I noticed that everything in state.source.postTypes and libraries.source.handlers is duplicated for the added CPT

I don’t know if this is the intended behavior or am I making anything wrong??

By the way
I’m about to release this site soon and I’m very excited to share it with you so I can get your helpful feedback

Thanks guys.

Read full topic
item.source: Every thing is duplicated in source when adding custom post types
